top.name: Crypt Architect
top.rules_text: Raise a Crypt Pillar on a corpse tile (16HP 1DMG). Friendly undead within 2 tiles gain +2 damage. Pillar creates corpse on death.

channel.name: Crypt Architect (Channel)
channel.rules_text: Channel: Pillar also gives undead within range +2 armor

bottom.name: Spectral Bridge
bottom.rules_text: Create shadow terrain in a line of 3 tiles from a corpse. Your undead on shadow tiles have +1 speed and phasing (ignore difficult terrain).
